---
title: "About"
---

## Background

I am currently pursuing a Master in Business Analytics at the University of California San Diego. Before UC San Diego, I studied Finance at Shanghai Jiao Tong University and completed a minor in Business Data Science.

My academic background has given me training in business analytics, machine learning, optimization, finance, and data analysis. I am especially interested in applying analytical methods to real business problems.

## Professional Interests

I am interested in marketing analytics, experimentation, market research, and data-driven decision making. Through previous internships, I have worked on projects involving financial analysis, market analysis, reporting, data reconciliation, and industry research.

## Technical Skills

- Python
- SQL
- Excel / MS Office
- NumPy
- Pandas
- SciPy
- Matplotlib

## Current Work

This website is a place to organize my coursework, projects, and analytical writing for MGTA 495 and related work.
